backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the backend that defines an Enquiry type, stores enquiries in a list, and exposes submitEnquiry (write) and getAllEnquiries (query) endpoints. Also includes blob storage via a mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their target files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels — primarily covering image path fixes across KitchenUtensils, HouseholdProducts, ProductCategories, and FeaturedProducts components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components like Header, HeroSection, ProductCategories, ContactForm, Footer, and utility files like hooks and Tailwind config.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, Google Fonts preconnect for Playfair Display and Inter, and a root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order — banner, header, hero, product categories, featured products, kitchen/household sections, gallery, reviews, location, contact, footer, and floating UI elements.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with name, phone, message, and callback checkbox fields; validates input, submits to the backend canister via useSubmitEnquiry, and opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message on success.
Displays five customer testimonial cards with animated star ratings and scroll-triggered fade-in transitions using IntersectionObserver.
A dialog popup that triggers on desktop mouse-leave or after 30 seconds on mobile, promoting a bulk order WhatsApp discount with call and WhatsApp CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of 8 featured kitchen products with images, badges, descriptions, and WhatsApp inquiry buttons, using an IntersectionObserver for scroll-based animations.
frontend/src/components/FestiveOfferBann: A dismissible top banner announcing a festive discount offer with a clickable phone number link and a close button.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button with a pulse animation that links to a pre-filled WhatsApp message for product enquiries.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product categories, contact details, and WhatsApp/call CTAs for Dwarka Bartan Store.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed responsive header with logo, desktop nav links, a call CTA button, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu that highlights on scroll.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, trust badges, call/WhatsApp/directions CTA buttons, and summary stats for Dwarka Bartan Store.
frontend/src/components/HouseholdProduct: Renders a 'Household Products' section with a single product card (colorful plastic dustbins) that includes an image, description, and a WhatsApp enquiry button linking to a hardcoded number.
Renders a 'Kitchen Utensils' section displaying a grid of five product cards (casseroles, trays, water bottles, etc.), each with an image, description, and a WhatsApp enquiry button.
Renders a store location section with an embedded Google Maps iframe, address, phone number, and business hours cards, with a scroll-triggered fade-in animation via IntersectionObserver.
frontend/src/components/MobileCallBar.ts: Renders a fixed bottom call-to-action bar visible only on mobile screens, linking directly to the store's phone number.
frontend/src/components/PhotoGallery.tsx: Renders a photo gallery grid of 11 store images with lazy-loaded, scroll-triggered fade-in animations per item, a hover caption overlay, and a WhatsApp contact button at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/ProductCategorie: Renders a six-category product grid (stainless steel, pressure cookers, cookware, etc.) with scroll-triggered animated cards, each containing an image, description, and a WhatsApp enquiry button.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: React section component displaying five reasons to choose Dwarka Bartan Store (quality, price, variety, service, trust) as animated cards with intersection observer, plus a call-to-action banner with a phone link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitEnquiry mutation hook that calls the backend actor's submitEnquiry method and invalidates the enquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for gold and steel color palettes in light and dark modes, and utility classes for gradients, shadows, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based gold/steel color tokens, display/body font families, custom shadows, border radii, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Dwarka Bartan Store website's architecture, design decisions, known issues (broken product images), and detailed image requirements for all product and category photos.
